name: Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 12 Ounces boned and skinned chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 medium green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes, green bell pepper, and onion in the crockpot. Place chicken on top.
2. In a medium bowl, mix the next 10 ingredients (tomato through chicken broth) together.
Pour the mixture over the chicken and vegetables.
3. Cover and cook on low for 7-10 hours or on high for 4-5 hours.
4. If using the low setting, turn up to high. Mix cornstarch and water in a separate bowl and stir into the broth. Cover and cook for an additional 10 to 15 minutes, or until thickened and bubbly.
